pages.text:
AMBASSADE DE COREF

EN FRANCE

( Traduction non officielle )

INSTRUMENT D'ADHESION

République de Corée déclare qu'il adhère à la

Convention concernant les expositions internationales signée à Paris le 22 novembre 1928, telle que modifiée par le Protocole du 30 novembre 1972 et amendée le 24 juin 1982, conformément aux dispositions de l'Article 3 du Protocole, et qu'il s'acquittera de bonne foi de toutes les obligations qui sont prévues dans la Convention et le Protocole.

En FOI DE QUOI, je, soussigné Kwang Soo CHOI, Ministre des Affaires étrangères, ai signé le présent instrument d'adhésion et apposé le Sceau du Ministre des Affaires étrangères de la République de Corée.

Fait à Séoul, le 12 Mai 1987

Signature Kwang Soo CHOI

Ministre des Affaires étrangères

외 무 부 가 입 서

국제박람회에 관한 협약이 1928년 11월 22일 파리에서 작성되었고, 동 협약은 1972년 11월 30일자 의정서 및 1982년 6월 24일자 개정안에 의하여 개정, 보완 되었으며, 또한 상기 의정서의 제3조는 동 의정서가 1973년 11월 29일 이후 1928년 협약의 당사국 정부에 의한 가입을 위하여 개방된다는 취지로 규정하고 있으므로, 대한민국 정부는 이에 1928년 협약과, 1982년 6월 24일의 개정안을 포함한, 1972년 의정서에 가입 하며 또한 그에 포함된 모든 규정을 성실히 이행할 것을 약속한다.

이상의 증거로, 본인 대한민국 외무부장관 최광수는 이 가입서에 서명하고 대한민국 외무부장관인을 원해

진과의
일천 구백 팔십 칠년 오 십이일 서울에서 작성하였다.

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

REPUBLIC OF KOREA

(TRANSLATION)

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

WHEREAS the Convention relating to International

Exhibitions was done at Paris on 22 November 1928;

WHEREAS the Convention was amended and supplemented by the protocol of 30 November 1972 and the Amendment of 24 June 1982:

AND WHEREAS Article 3 of the above-mentioned Protocol provides to the effect that the Protocol shall remain open after 29 November 1973:

NOW THEREFORE, the Government of the Republic of Korea hereby accedes to the 1928 Convention and the 1972 Protocol, including the Amendment of 24 June 1982, and undertakes faithfully to fulfill and carry out all the provisions therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I, Kwang Soo Choi, Minister of

Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Korea, have signed the present Instrument of Accession and caused the Seal of the Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of

Korea to be hereunto affixed.

/ Done at

...

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

REPUBLIC OF KOREA

(TRANSLATION)

;

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

WHEREAS the Convention relating to International

Exhibitions was done at Paris on 22 November 1928:

WHEREAS the Convention was amended and supplemented by the Protocol of 30 November 1972 and the Amendment of 24 June 1982;

AND WHEREAS Article 3 of the above-mentioned Protocol for accession by Governments Parties to the 1928 Convention after 29 November 1973;

NOW THEREFORE, the Government of the Republic of Korea hereby accedes to the 1928 Convention and the 1972 Protocol, including the Amendment of 24 June 1982, and undertakes faithfully to fulfill and carry out all the provisions therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I, Kwang Soo Choi, Minister of

Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Korea, have signed the present Instrument of Accession and caused the Seal of the Minister of foreign Affairs of the Republic of

Korea to be hereunto affixed.

/ Done at

" Done at the City of Seoul, this twelfth day of Mav in the year of one thousand nine hundred and eighty-seven.

000 6n0】 finister or poreigh Affairs
